message.content:
The user wants me to identify configurable operational parameters from the provided image.
The image is a page from a Trane manual, specifically showing diagrams of a CVGF chiller unit.
The text on the page is in Chinese.
The diagrams show components like:
- 图1. 常规CVGF机组组件 (Fig 1. Standard CVGF Unit Components)
- 图2. 典型的CVGF机组部件分布（后视图） (Fig 2. Typical CVGF Unit Component Layout (Rear View))
- Labels pointing to parts:
    - 安全阀 (Safety Valve)
    - 冷凝器 (Condenser)
    - 二级压缩机 (Two-stage Compressor)
    - 机身安装启动柜（选项） (Frame-mounted Start Cabinet (Option))
    - 蒸发器 (Evaporator)
    - 油泵 (Oil Pump)
    - CH530控制面板 (CH530 Control Panel)
    - 机组铭牌 (Unit Nameplate)
    - 电机 (Motor)
    - 油冷却器 (Oil Cooler)
    - 经济器

text:
The user wants me to identify configurable operational parameters from the provided image.
The image is a page from a Trane manual, specifically showing diagrams of a CVGF chiller unit.
The text on the page is in Chinese.
The diagrams show components like:
- 图1. 常规CVGF机组组件 (Fig 1. Standard CVGF Unit Components)
- 图2. 典型的CVGF机组部件分布（后视图） (Fig 2. Typical CVGF Unit Component Layout (Rear View))
- Labels pointing to parts:
    - 安全阀 (Safety Valve)
    - 冷凝器 (Condenser)
    - 二级压缩机 (Two-stage Compressor)
    - 机身安装启动柜（选项） (Frame-mounted Start Cabinet (Option))
    - 蒸发器 (Evaporator)
    - 油泵 (Oil Pump)
    - CH530控制面板 (CH530 Control Panel)
    - 机组铭牌 (Unit Nameplate)
    - 电机 (Motor)
    - 油冷却器 (Oil Cooler)
    - 经济器
